author.bio: Filecoin is a data storage network backed by an application token. The Filecoin token sale ended in September 2017. Sites purporting to sell Filecoin are SCAMS.
author.name: Filecoin

content.text: Happy Valentine’s Day, Internet 💝! We love you so much that we are opening the Filecoin devnets and repos to the public today. Join us on our journey to decentralize data storage! https://filecoin.io/blog/opening-filecoin-project-repos/  #filecoin #opensource #web3
